rows.notes: Clear reading. Main title header for the page, underlined.

rows.description: By Dr. Shortridge's Trustees one years Rent (Charges to Xtmas 1837)
rows.notes: Clear reading of text and amounts. The description combines two lines visually grouped by a brace. Vertical lines unambiguous. All values in valid range.
Description is mostly clear, 'Shuttles'' and '3/p C' are slightly faint but legible. Amounts are clear, aligned, and in valid range.

rows.description: By The Receiver Interim = to Dimes to Mid 1837. 428
rows.notes: Description is mostly clear. No pounds digit is present, interpreting as an empty pounds field (0). Shillings and pence are clear, aligned, and in valid range.

rows.description: By Do. from Office of Biblect
rows.notes: Description is clear. Amounts '1', '6', '8' are clear and aligned in their respective columns. A faint '7' appears immediately after the 8 pence digit, but it does not correspond to any standard fraction symbol (ob, q, 3q) and is thus not interpreted as a fraction. Confidence reduced due to the ambiguous trailing '7'.

rows.description: One fourth of improved Rent from Pickford (Norris & Swain, Due to Mich. 1834)
rows.notes: Clear reading of description and amounts. Vertical lines unambiguous. All values in valid range.

rows.description: By Do. from Medenhain to Xtmas 1836
rows.notes: Description is clear. Amounts are clear, aligned, and in valid range. A brace starts here, visually grouping this item with the next two, but each has its own amount.

rows.description: By Mr. Reaton & Intintula, Mr. Snowden (fees for the Lease of his Estate)
rows.notes: Description is clear. Amounts are clear, aligned, and in valid range. This line is visually grouped with the previous and next lines by a brace.

rows.description: By Mr. Day on the Library Rent (as part of Mr. Snowdon's Bill)
rows.notes: Description is clear. Amounts are clear, aligned, and in valid range. This line is visually grouped with the previous ones by a brace.

rows.description: Reimbursement to Durned from L. Bewington (Rents - 1/2 years to XDay 1837)
rows.notes: Description is mostly clear, 'Durned' is somewhat faded. Amounts are clear, aligned, and in valid range. Brace groups two lines of text for a single amount.

rows.description: By Mr. Dayman Bursar, Incrementum to Midr. 1838
rows.notes: Clear reading of description and amounts. Vertical lines unambiguous. All values in valid range. Brace groups two lines of text for a single amount.
Clear reading of description and amounts. Vertical lines unambiguous. All values in valid range.

rows.description: By Mr. Dawson Dean's Fees 1 3/4 to Midr. 1838
rows.notes: Clear reading of description and amounts. The '1 3/4' is part of the descriptive text indicating a period, not a pence fraction. All values in valid range.
Clear total amount indicated by the '£' symbol and double underline. 'Summa' is implied by context. All values in valid range.
